title: andrographis glandulosa
intro: Andrographis glandulosa, also known as Kalmegh, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Andrographis glandulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of common cold and flu, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, and tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
